title: Dont Let Him Go To Portugal
description: A surreal and philosophical musical comedy show combining stand-up, puppetry, and animation to tell the autobiographical story of an outrageous breakup and how through it I discovered the meaning of life and also a bunch of stuff about worms. By artist/comedian whose credits include ‘One to Watch’ Funny Women 2025 Stage Awards, Semi-finalist Musical Comedy Awards 2025, Soho Theatre Labs Comedy Plus Alumni 2025, and with over 4 million views on Instagram. A true alternative comic, the piece bends between genres in a celebration of unbridled creativity and absurdism.
